WITH "events_7day" AS (
  SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201227
),
"seven_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM "events_7day" AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NOT NULL
    AND "ep".value:"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep".value:"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"events_2day" AS (
  SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "USER_PSEUDO_ID", "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
),
"two_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM "events_2day" AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NOT NULL
    AND "ep".value:"key"::TEXT = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep".value:"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "distinct_pseudo_users_in_7day_not_2day"
FROM "seven_day_users" AS "s"
LEFT JOIN "two_day_users" AS "t"
  ON "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" = "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
WHERE "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NULL;

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "date", "totals", "trafficSource" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
),
"source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    SUM(COALESCE("totals":"transactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0)) AS "total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE YEAR(TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2017
  GROUP BY "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT "traffic_source"
  FROM "source_totals"
  ORDER BY "total_transaction_revenue" DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    SUM(COALESCE("totals":"transactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0)) AS "monthly_total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE YEAR(TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2017
  GROUP BY
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT,
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT
  mr."traffic_source",
  ROUND((MAX(mr."monthly_total_transaction_revenue") - MIN(mr."monthly_total_transaction_revenue")) / 1000000, 2) AS "difference_in_millions"
FROM "monthly_revenue" AS mr
INNER JOIN "top_source" AS ts
  ON mr."traffic_source" = ts."traffic_source"
GROUP BY mr."traffic_source"
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

WITH "feb_sessions" AS (
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170202
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170217
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170218
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170219
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170224
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170225
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170227
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170228
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("date", 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "feb_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"transaction_hits" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(s."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "transaction_date",
    s."device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_type",
    s."visitId",
    h.value:"transaction":"transactionId"::STRING AS "transaction_id"
  FROM "feb_sessions" AS s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits") AS h
  WHERE h.value:"transaction":"transactionId" IS NOT NULL
),
"first_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "transaction_date",
    "device_type"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      "fullVisitorId",
      "transaction_date",
      "device_type",
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
        ORDER BY "transaction_date", "visitId", "transaction_id"
      ) AS "rn"
    FROM "transaction_hits"
  )
  WHERE "rn" = 1
)
SELECT
  fv."fullVisitorId",
  DATEDIFF('DAY', fv."first_visit_date", ft."transaction_date") AS "days_elapsed",
  ft."device_type"
FROM "first_visit" AS fv
INNER JOIN "first_transaction" AS ft
  ON fv."fullVisitorId" = ft."fullVisitorId"
ORDER BY fv."fullVisitorId"
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -15.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH "session_hits" AS (
  SELECT
    "t"."trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "product".value:"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616 AS "t",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "t"."hits") AS "hit",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "t"."trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "product".value:"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170620 AS "t",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "t"."hits") AS "hit",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "t"."trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "product".value:"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170625 AS "t",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "t"."hits") AS "hit",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "t"."trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "day",
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "week",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("t"."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "product".value:"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170626 AS "t",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "t"."hits") AS "hit",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE "product".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    SUM("product_revenue") AS "total_product_revenue"
  FROM "session_hits"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM("product_revenue") DESC) = 1
),
"daily_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    "day",
    SUM("product_revenue") AS "daily_revenue"
  FROM "session_hits"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source", "day"
),
"weekly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    "week",
    SUM("product_revenue") AS "weekly_revenue"
  FROM "session_hits"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source", "week"
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "traffic_source",
    "month",
    SUM("product_revenue") AS "monthly_revenue"
  FROM "session_hits"
  GROUP BY "traffic_source", "month"
)
SELECT
  "ts"."traffic_source",
  MAX("dr"."daily_revenue") / 1000000 AS "max_daily_product_revenue_millions",
  MAX("wr"."weekly_revenue") / 1000000 AS "max_weekly_product_revenue_millions",
  MAX("mr"."monthly_revenue") / 1000000 AS "max_monthly_product_revenue_millions"
FROM "top_source" AS "ts"
LEFT JOIN "daily_revenue" AS "dr"
  ON "ts"."traffic_source" = "dr"."traffic_source"
LEFT JOIN "weekly_revenue" AS "wr"
  ON "ts"."traffic_source" = "wr"."traffic_source"
LEFT JOIN "monthly_revenue" AS "mr"
  ON "ts"."traffic_source" = "mr"."traffic_source"
GROUP BY "ts"."traffic_source"
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-04-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')
),
"session_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "s"."month",
    "s"."fullVisitorId",
    "s"."pageviews",
    "s"."transactions",
    MAX(IFF("p".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)) AS "has_product_revenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS "s",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits", OUTER => TRUE) AS "h",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "h".value:"product", OUTER => TRUE) AS "p"
  GROUP BY
    "s"."month",
    "s"."fullVisitorId",
    "s"."pageviews",
    "s"."transactions"
),
"session_classification" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN "transactions" >= 1 AND "has_product_revenue" = 1 THEN 'purchase'
      WHEN "transactions" IS NULL AND "has_product_revenue" = 0 THEN 'non-purchase'
    END AS "purchase_group"
  FROM "session_revenue"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  "purchase_group",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "fullVisitorId") AS "distinct_visitors",
  SUM("pageviews") AS "total_pageviews",
  SUM("pageviews") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT "fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "session_classification"
WHERE "purchase_group" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  "month",
  "purchase_group"
ORDER BY
  "month" ASC,
  "purchase_group" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -35.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH "july_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170715
),
"youtube_buyers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "js"."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "july_sessions" AS "js",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "js"."hits") AS "hit",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE LOWER("product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING) LIKE '%youtube%'
    AND COALESCE("product".value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"product_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING AS "product_name",
    SUM(COALESCE("product".value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0)) AS "total_quantity_purchased"
  FROM "july_sessions" AS "js"
  INNER JOIN "youtube_buyers" AS "yb"
    ON "js"."fullVisitorId" = "yb"."fullVisitorId",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "js"."hits") AS "hit",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "hit".value:"product") AS "product"
  WHERE LOWER("product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING) NOT LIKE '%youtube%'
    AND COALESCE("product".value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
  GROUP BY "product".value:"v2ProductName"::STRING
)
SELECT "product_name"
FROM "product_totals"
ORDER BY "total_quantity_purchased" DESC, "product_name"
LIMIT 1
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "trafficSource",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170130
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "trafficSource",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170131
),
"hit_sequence" AS (
  SELECT
    "s"."fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    "s"."visitId" AS "visitId",
    "h".value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING AS "current_page",
    LEAD("h".value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING) OVER (
      PARTITION BY "s"."fullVisitorId", "s"."visitId"
      ORDER BY "h".value:"hitNumber"::NUMBER
    ) AS "next_page",
    (
      LEAD("h".value:"time"::NUMBER) OVER (
        PARTITION BY "s"."fullVisitorId", "s"."visitId"
        ORDER BY "h".value:"hitNumber"::NUMBER
      ) - "h".value:"time"::NUMBER
    ) / 1000.0 AS "time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "sessions" AS "s",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "h"
  WHERE "s"."trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
),
"home_transitions" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page",
    "time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "hit_sequence"
  WHERE "current_page" LIKE '/home%'
    AND "next_page" IS NOT NULL
),
"next_page_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page",
    COUNT(*) AS "transition_count"
  FROM "home_transitions"
  GROUP BY "next_page"
),
"top_next_page" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page"
  FROM "next_page_counts"
  ORDER BY "transition_count" DESC, "next_page"
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  "t"."next_page",
  MAX("h"."time_on_home_seconds") AS "max_time_on_home_seconds"
FROM "top_next_page" AS "t"
JOIN "home_transitions" AS "h"
  ON "t"."next_page" = "h"."next_page"
GROUP BY "t"."next_page"
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170602
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-06-01' AND '2017-07-31'
    AND "totals":"pageviews" IS NOT NULL
),
"visitor_monthly" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "classification",
    "fullVisitorId",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "visitor_total_pageviews"
  FROM "sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "classification",
    "fullVisitorId"
),
"monthly_avg" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "classification",
    AVG("visitor_total_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
  FROM "visitor_monthly"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "classification"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "classification" = 'purchase' THEN "avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_purchase_pageviews",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "classification" = 'non_purchase' THEN "avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_non_purchase_pageviews"
FROM "monthly_avg"
GROUP BY "month"
ORDER BY "month" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -35.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "user_events" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "event_date",
    "visitStartTime" AS "visit_start_time",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160814
),
"user_summary" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("event_date") AS "first_visit_date",
    MAX("event_date") AS "last_visit_date",
    MIN(CASE WHEN "transactions" > 0 THEN "event_date" END) AS "first_transaction_date"
  FROM "user_events"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"last_recorded_event" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "first_visit_date",
    CASE
      WHEN "first_transaction_date" IS NOT NULL AND "first_transaction_date" < "last_visit_date" THEN "first_transaction_date"
      ELSE "last_visit_date"
    END AS "last_recorded_event_date"
  FROM "user_summary"
),
"mobile_last_events" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    l."fullVisitorId",
    l."first_visit_date",
    l."last_recorded_event_date"
  FROM "last_recorded_event" AS l
  JOIN "user_events" AS e
    ON l."fullVisitorId" = e."fullVisitorId"
   AND l."last_recorded_event_date" = e."event_date"
  WHERE e."device_category" = 'mobile'
)
SELECT
  MAX(DATEDIFF(day, "first_visit_date", "last_recorded_event_date")) AS "longest_days_between_first_visit_and_last_recorded_event"
FROM "mobile_last_events"

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE("userId", "fullVisitorId") AS "user_key",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    LOWER("device":"deviceCategory"::STRING) AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    COALESCE("userId", "fullVisitorId") AS "user_key",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    LOWER("device":"deviceCategory"::STRING) AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    COALESCE("userId", "fullVisitorId") AS "user_key",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    LOWER("device":"deviceCategory"::STRING) AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    COALESCE("userId", "fullVisitorId") AS "user_key",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    LOWER("device":"deviceCategory"::STRING) AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160819
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    COALESCE("userId", "fullVisitorId") AS "user_key",
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    LOWER("device":"deviceCategory"::STRING) AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160823
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "user_key",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "user_key"
),
"mobile_transaction_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "user_key",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "transactions" > 0
    AND "device_category" ILIKE '%mobile%'
),
"first_mobile_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "user_key",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_transaction_date"
  FROM "mobile_transaction_sessions"
  GROUP BY "user_key"
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  "s"."fullVisitorId"
FROM "all_sessions" AS "s"
INNER JOIN "first_visit" AS "fv"
  ON "s"."user_key" = "fv"."user_key"
INNER JOIN "first_mobile_transaction" AS "ft"
  ON "s"."user_key" = "ft"."user_key"
WHERE "ft"."first_transaction_date" > "fv"."first_visit_date"
ORDER BY "s"."fullVisitorId" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "date", "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "date", "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "date", "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160827
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "date", "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160831
),
"initial_period_new_users" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('20160801', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20170430', 'YYYYMMDD')
    AND "visitNumber" = 1
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"qualified_initial_users" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('20160801', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20170430', 'YYYYMMDD')
    AND "visitNumber" = 1
    AND COALESCE("totals":"timeOnSite"::NUMBER, 0) > 300
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"subsequent_purchasers" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s
  INNER JOIN "qualified_initial_users" AS q
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = q."fullVisitorId"
  WHERE s."visitNumber" > 1
    AND COALESCE(s."totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1
  GROUP BY s."fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT p."fullVisitorId") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT n."fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "percentage_new_users"
FROM "initial_period_new_users" AS n
LEFT JOIN "subsequent_purchasers" AS p
  ON n."fullVisitorId" = p."fullVisitorId";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: aggregate shape confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "publication_base" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "publication_dt",
    ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") AS "inventor_count_per_publication"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" = 'CA'
    AND "publication_date" >= 19600101
    AND "publication_date" <= 20201231
    AND "inventor" IS NOT NULL
    AND ARRAY_SIZE("inventor") > 0
),
"periodized" AS (
  SELECT
    ((FLOOR((YEAR("publication_dt") - 1960) / 5) * 5) + 1960) AS "period_start_year",
    "inventor_count_per_publication",
    "publication_number"
  FROM "publication_base"
  WHERE YEAR("publication_dt") BETWEEN 1960 AND 2020
)
SELECT
  ("period_start_year"::VARCHAR || '-' || LEAST("period_start_year" + 4, 2020)::VARCHAR) AS "5_year_interval",
  AVG("inventor_count_per_publication") AS "avg_inventors_per_patent",
  COUNT(*) AS "patent_publication_count"
FROM "periodized"
GROUP BY "period_start_year"
ORDER BY "period_start_year" ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -25.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH "ipc_filtered" AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(p."assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT, p."assignee":"name"::TEXT) AS "assignee_name",
    p."publication_number" AS "publication_number",
    p."country_code" AS "country_code"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."ipc", OUTER => TRUE) AS f
  WHERE (
    COALESCE(f.value:"code"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT) ILIKE 'A61%'
    OR p."publication_number" ILIKE 'A61%'
  )
    AND COALESCE(p."assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT, p."assignee":"name"::TEXT) IS NOT NULL
    AND p."country_code" IS NOT NULL
),
"assignee_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "ipc_filtered"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name"
  FROM "assignee_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "assignee_name" ASC) = 1
),
"assignee_year_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    i."assignee_name",
    REGEXP_SUBSTR(i."publication_number", '(19|20)[0-9]{2}') AS "pub_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT i."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "ipc_filtered" AS i
  INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS t
    ON i."assignee_name" = t."assignee_name"
  GROUP BY i."assignee_name", REGEXP_SUBSTR(i."publication_number", '(19|20)[0-9]{2}')
),
"top_year" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "pub_year"
  FROM "assignee_year_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "assignee_name" ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "pub_year" ASC NULLS LAST) = 1
),
"jurisdiction_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    i."assignee_name",
    i."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT i."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "ipc_filtered" AS i
  INNER JOIN "top_year" AS y
    ON i."assignee_name" = y."assignee_name"
   AND (
     REGEXP_SUBSTR(i."publication_number", '(19|20)[0-9]{2}') = y."pub_year"
     OR y."pub_year" IS NULL
   )
  GROUP BY i."assignee_name", i."country_code"
),
"top_5" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "country_code",
    "patent_count",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "assignee_name" ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code" ASC) AS "rn"
  FROM "jurisdiction_counts"
)
SELECT
  "assignee_name",
  LISTAGG("country_code", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code" ASC) AS "top_5_jurisdiction_codes"
FROM "top_5"
WHERE "rn" <= 5
GROUP BY "assignee_name";
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

WITH "a61_applications" AS (
  SELECT
    "application_number",
    "filing_date",
    COALESCE("assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT, "assignee":"name"::TEXT) AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE (
    "uspc"::TEXT ILIKE '%A61%'
    OR "publication_number" ILIKE '%A61%'
    OR "application_kind" ILIKE '%A61%'
  )
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM "a61_applications"
  WHERE "assignee_name" IS NOT NULL
    AND "assignee_name" <> ''
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") DESC, "assignee_name") = 1
),
"assignee_years" AS (
  SELECT
    a."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(a."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT a."application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM "a61_applications" AS a
  INNER JOIN "top_assignee" AS t
    ON a."assignee_name" = t."assignee_name"
  WHERE a."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH(a."filing_date"::TEXT) = 8
  GROUP BY
    a."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(a."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD'))
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT a."application_number") DESC, DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(a."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) DESC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  "assignee_name",
  YEAR("filing_year") AS "year",
  "application_count"
FROM "assignee_years";
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "assignee_apps" AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(f.value:"name"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT) AS "assignee_name",
    p."application_number" AS "application_number",
    p."country_code" AS "country_code",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(p."application_number", '(19|20)\\d{2}')) AS "application_year"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."assignee_harmonized") AS f
  WHERE p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND COALESCE(f.value:"name"::TEXT, f.value::TEXT) IS NOT NULL
    AND p."application_number" ILIKE '%A01B3%'
),
"base_apps" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "assignee_name",
    "application_number",
    "country_code",
    "application_year"
  FROM "assignee_apps"
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "total_applications"
  FROM "base_apps"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") DESC, "assignee_name"
  ) <= 3
),
"assignee_years" AS (
  SELECT
    b."assignee_name",
    b."application_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT b."application_number") AS "applications_in_year"
  FROM "base_apps" AS b
  INNER JOIN "assignee_totals" AS t
    ON b."assignee_name" = t."assignee_name"
  WHERE b."application_year" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY b."assignee_name", b."application_year"
),
"top_years" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "application_year",
    "applications_in_year"
  FROM "assignee_years"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "assignee_name"
    ORDER BY "applications_in_year" DESC, "application_year" DESC
  ) = 1
),
"year_country_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    b."assignee_name",
    b."application_year",
    b."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT b."application_number") AS "applications_in_country"
  FROM "base_apps" AS b
  INNER JOIN "top_years" AS y
    ON b."assignee_name" = y."assignee_name"
   AND b."application_year" = y."application_year"
  WHERE b."country_code" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY b."assignee_name", b."application_year", b."country_code"
),
"top_countries" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "application_year",
    "country_code"
  FROM "year_country_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "assignee_name", "application_year"
    ORDER BY "applications_in_country" DESC, "country_code"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  t."assignee_name",
  t."total_applications",
  y."application_year" AS "year_with_most_applications",
  y."applications_in_year" AS "applications_in_top_year",
  c."country_code" AS "top_country_code_in_top_year"
FROM "assignee_totals" AS t
LEFT JOIN "top_years" AS y
  ON t."assignee_name" = y."assignee_name"
LEFT JOIN "top_countries" AS c
  ON y."assignee_name" = c."assignee_name"
 AND y."application_year" = c."application_year"
ORDER BY t."total_applications" DESC, t."assignee_name";
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

WITH "months" AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(MONTH, SEQ4(), DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE('2008-01-01'))) AS "month_start"
  FROM TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 180))
),
"iot_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE(t1."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month_start",
    t1."publication_number"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  WHERE t1."filing_date" BETWEEN 20080101 AND 20221231
    AND t1."publication_number" ILIKE 'US%'
    AND t1."abstract_localized"::STRING ILIKE '%internet of things%'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(t1."filing_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD') IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  m."month_start",
  COUNT(i."publication_number") AS "publication_count"
FROM "months" AS m
LEFT JOIN "iot_publications" AS i
  ON m."month_start" = i."month_start"
GROUP BY m."month_start"
ORDER BY m."month_start" ASC

WITH "granted_2010_utility" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "filing_date"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20101231
    AND "filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND LOWER("application_kind") = 'utility'
),
"forward_citations" AS (
  SELECT
    c.value:"publication_number"::TEXT AS "cited_publication_number",
    p."application_number" AS "citing_application_number",
    p."filing_date" AS "citing_filing_date"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."citation") AS c
  WHERE c.value:"publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
),
"citation_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    g."publication_number",
    COUNT(DISTINCT f."citing_application_number") AS "forward_citation_count"
  FROM "granted_2010_utility" AS g
  LEFT JOIN "forward_citations" AS f
    ON f."cited_publication_number" = g."publication_number"
   AND TO_DATE(f."citing_filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD') >= TO_DATE(g."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')
   AND TO_DATE(f."citing_filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD') < DATEADD(YEAR, 10, TO_DATE(g."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD'))
  GROUP BY g."publication_number"
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "utility_patents_with_exactly_one_forward_citation"
FROM "citation_counts"
WHERE "forward_citation_count" = 1;

WITH "granted_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "grant_date" BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20181231
),
"sea_citations" AS (
  SELECT
    "pub_cleaned" AS "publication_number",
    COUNT(*) AS "backward_citations_sea_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.DISCLOSURES_13
  WHERE "standard" = 'SEA'
  GROUP BY "pub_cleaned"
)
SELECT
  gp."publication_number",
  COALESCE(sc."backward_citations_sea_count", 0) AS "backward_citations_sea_count"
FROM "granted_patents" AS gp
LEFT JOIN "sea_citations" AS sc
  ON gp."publication_number" = sc."publication_number"
ORDER BY gp."publication_number"

WITH "pubs" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "claims_localized":"text"::STRING AS "claims_text"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE REGEXP_LIKE("publication_number", '^US[0-9]{4}[0-9]+B2$')
    AND TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REGEXP_SUBSTR("publication_number", '[0-9]+'), 1, 4)) BETWEEN 2008 AND 2018
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "pubs"
WHERE "claims_text" IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE("claims_text", '\\bclaim\\b', 'i');

WITH "family_application_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "family_id",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "distinct_application_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "family_id" IS NOT NULL
    AND "application_number" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "family_id"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") > 1
),
"cn_granted_patents" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    p."family_id",
    d."pub_cleaned"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p
  INNER JOIN PATENTS.PATENTS.DISCLOSURES_13 AS d
    ON p."family_id" = d."family_id"
  WHERE p."family_id" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."application_kind" = 'B'
    AND d."pub_cleaned" LIKE 'CN%'
    AND TRY_TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(d."pub_cleaned", 3, 4)) BETWEEN 2010 AND 2023
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT "cgp"."pub_cleaned") AS "patent_count"
FROM "cn_granted_patents" AS "cgp"
INNER JOIN "family_application_counts" AS "fac"
  ON "cgp"."family_id" = "fac"."family_id"

WITH "filtered_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc",
    "country_code",
    "kind_code"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" ILIKE '%US%'
    AND "kind_code" ILIKE '%B2%'
    AND (
      "publication_number" ILIKE 'US202206%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE 'US202207%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE 'US202208%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%202206%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%202207%'
      OR "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%202208%'
    )
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    REGEXP_SUBSTR(COALESCE(f.value:"symbol"::STRING, f.value::STRING), '^[A-Z][0-9]{2}[A-Z]') AS "ipc_4digit",
    fp."publication_number"
  FROM "filtered_publications" AS fp,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => fp."ipc") AS f
  WHERE COALESCE(f.value:"symbol"::STRING, f.value::STRING) IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  "ipc_4digit",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "patent_count"
FROM "ipc_codes"
WHERE "ipc_4digit" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "ipc_4digit"
ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "ipc_4digit" ASC
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "pubs" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "country_code" ILIKE 'US%'
    AND "kind_code" ILIKE 'B2'
    AND "publication_date" >= 20220601
    AND "publication_date" <= 20220930
),
"ipc_codes" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    SUBSTR(COALESCE(f.value:"code"::STRING, f.value::STRING), 1, 4) AS "ipc4_code"
  FROM "pubs",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "ipc") AS f
  WHERE COALESCE(f.value:"code"::STRING, f.value::STRING) IS NOT NULL
    AND LENGTH(SUBSTR(COALESCE(f.value:"code"::STRING, f.value::STRING), 1, 4)) = 4
),
"ipc_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4_code",
    COUNT(*) AS "ipc4_occurrence_count"
  FROM "ipc_codes"
  GROUP BY "publication_number", "ipc4_code"
),
"ranked_ipc" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "ipc4_code",
    "ipc4_occurrence_count",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "publication_number"
      ORDER BY "ipc4_occurrence_count" DESC, "ipc4_code" ASC
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "ipc_counts"
)
SELECT
  "publication_number",
  "ipc4_code",
  "ipc4_occurrence_count"
FROM "ranked_ipc"
WHERE "rn" = 1
  AND "ipc4_occurrence_count" >= 10
ORDER BY "ipc4_occurrence_count" DESC, "publication_number" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "us_b2_patents" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS "filing_date"
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%B2%'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') >= DATE '2010-01-01'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') < DATE '2015-01-01'
),
"forward_citations" AS (
  SELECT
    p."publication_number",
    p."filing_date",
    COUNT(cb.value) AS "forward_citation_count_within_1_month"
  FROM "us_b2_patents" AS p
  LEFT JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON a."publication_number" = p."publication_number"
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => a."cited_by") AS cb
    ON TRUE
  GROUP BY p."publication_number", p."filing_date"
),
"top_patent" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "filing_date",
    "forward_citation_count_within_1_month"
  FROM "forward_citations"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    ORDER BY "forward_citation_count_within_1_month" DESC, "publication_number"
  ) = 1
),
"top_patent_similar" AS (
  SELECT
    tp."publication_number" AS "target_publication_number",
    tp."filing_date",
    tp."forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
    sim.value:"publication_number"::STRING AS "similar_publication_number",
    COALESCE(sim.value:"score"::FLOAT, sim.value:"similarity"::FLOAT, sim.value:"distance"::FLOAT) AS "similarity_score"
  FROM "top_patent" AS tp
  JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB AS a
    ON a."publication_number" = tp."publication_number"
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => a."similar") AS sim
  WHERE sim.value:"publication_number"::STRING IS NOT NULL
),
"same_year_similar" AS (
  SELECT
    s."target_publication_number",
    s."filing_date",
    s."forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
    s."similar_publication_number",
    s."similarity_score"
  FROM "top_patent_similar" AS s
  JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS AS p2
    ON p2."publication_number" = s."similar_publication_number"
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p2."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') IS NOT NULL
    AND DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p2."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) = DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', s."filing_date")
)
SELECT
  "target_publication_number" AS "publication_number",
  "filing_date",
  "forward_citation_count_within_1_month",
  "similar_publication_number",
  "similarity_score"
FROM "same_year_similar"
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY "target_publication_number"
  ORDER BY "similarity_score" DESC NULLS LAST, "similar_publication_number"
) = 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates
